'''Nimondro''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Hobor]] who served as the [[Chief/Legends|Chief]] of the [[Hobor]] people of [[Tahlboor]] around [[6 BBY/Legends|5.5 BBY]]. He managed to learn about the [[sky cannon]] and how to use it, attempting to use it as leverage for peace talks with the [[Troob]]s. He truly wanted peace between the two peoples. Although he understood [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]], he pretended not to so as his diplomatic opponents would be kept off-guard. His daughter was [[Larka Nimondro]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Protocol Offensive]]'' {{1st}}
